aries:
♈ Aries

🔥 Energy: Restless push

💼 Career: Tum fast move karna chahoge, par coordination issues aayenge

❤️ Love: Choti baat pe argument escalate ho sakta hai

💰 Money: जल्दबाजी में decision avoid karo

🧘 Advice: Patience build karo

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Tum control chahte ho jab flow accept karna chahiye
taurus:
♉ Taurus

🔥 Energy: Grounded strength

💼 Career: Tumhara steady kaam trust build karega

❤️ Love: Emotional security feel hogi

💰 Money: Stable progress

🧘 Advice: Apni pace pe tikke raho

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Tum slow ho, par tumhe koi hila nahi sakta easily
gemini:
♊ Gemini

🔥 Energy: Distracted focus

💼 Career: Ek important task ignore ho sakta hai multitasking ke chakkar me

❤️ Love: Half communication misunderstanding create karega

💰 Money: Small errors loss la sakte hain

🧘 Advice: Simplify aur prioritize karo

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Tum attention divide karte ho jab focus zaruri hota hai
cancer:
♋ Cancer

🔥 Energy: Protective clarity

💼 Career: Tum situation ko emotionally samajh ke sahi decision loge

❤️ Love: Deep understanding bond strong karegi

💰 Money: Risk avoid karna smart rahega

🧘 Advice: Apni intuition pe trust karo

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Tum feel sab karte ho, par kabhi accept nahi karte turant

♌ Leo
